hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.notebook_path // empty'); repo="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)}"; [ -n "$repo" ] || exit 0; case "$f" in "$repo"/*) if [ "$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null)" = "main" ]; then echo 'Direct edits to main are forbidden! Use a feature/bugfix branch or worktree.' >&2; exit 2; fi;; esac
